budgets.left_relation_coefficient_mass: one class per relation alpha, weighted by sum_{beta,gamma} p_{alpha,beta,gamma}
budgets.left_relation_support: one class per relation alpha, weighted by number of nonzero tensor rows with that alpha
budgets.output_relation_coefficient_mass: one class per relation gamma, weighted by sum_{alpha,beta} p_{alpha,beta,gamma}
budgets.output_relation_support: one class per relation gamma, weighted by number of nonzero tensor rows with that gamma
budgets.relation_orbit_size: one class per A985 relation, weighted by representative relation orbit size
budgets.right_relation_coefficient_mass: one class per relation beta, weighted by sum_{alpha,gamma} p_{alpha,beta,gamma}
budgets.right_relation_support: one class per relation beta, weighted by number of nonzero tensor rows with that beta
budgets.tensor_coefficient_value: one class per nonzero T985 triple, weighted by p_{alpha,beta,gamma}

coefficient_law: [t^n q^Q] prod_w sum_{k>=0} binomial(m_B(w)+k-1,k) t^k q^{kw}
seam: This is relation/tensor symmetric-product stack counting, not the full 985x985 relation-pair bilinear stack and not a motivic/sheafified CoHA.
series_formula: Z_B(t,q)=prod_w (1 - t q^w)^(-m_B(w)), truncated to n<=40 and q<=512
